name: get_media
description: Retrieve a previously generated media file (image, video, music) by URL or task_id. Use to verify media exists before using it, or to get metadata about past generations.

url.description: Media URL (e.g., /ui/uploads/sunset_abc123.png from a previous generation)

task_id.description: Alternative: Task ID from a previous generation (will look up the URL)

returns: task_id (string) for async status tracking via get_task_status
notes: Async operation - use get_task_status to check progress.
